heading: Omitted
label: 76 to 92 Omitted
notes: CodificationSections 76 to 92, relating to Territory of Alaska, were omitted in view of admission of Alaska into the Union.Section 76, , , specified enacting clause of all laws, and provided that no law shall embrace more than one subject.act Aug. 24, 1912, ch. 387, § 837 Stat. 514Section 77, acts , ; , ; , , detailed general legislative power and limitation.Aug. 24, 1912, ch. 387, § 937 Stat. 514Apr. 13, 1934, ch. 119, § 248 Stat. 583June 3, 1948, ch. 39662 Stat. 302Section 78, acts , ; , , required all taxes to be uniform.Aug. 24, 1912, ch. 387, § 937 Stat. 514June 3, 1948, ch. 39662 Stat. 302Section 79, acts , ; , , limited amount of taxes for Territorial purposes.Aug. 24, 1912, ch. 387, § 937 Stat. 514June 3, 1948, ch. 39662 Stat. 302Section 80, , , prohibited legislature from passing laws depriving judges, officers, etc. of district court of authority or jurisdiction.act Aug. 24, 1912, ch. 387, § 337 Stat. 512Section 81, , , related to rules of legislature, quorum and majority.act Aug. 24, 1912, ch. 387, § 1037 Stat. 515Section 82, , , prohibited members of legislature from holding other office.act Aug. 24, 1912, ch. 387, § 1137 Stat. 516Section 83, , , prohibited persons holding appointment under the United States from being members of legislature or holding other Territorial office.act Aug. 24, 1912, ch. 387, § 1137 Stat. 516Section 84, , , specified exemptions and privileges of members of legislature.act Aug. 24, 1912, ch. 387, § 1237 Stat. 516Section 85, , , described manner of passage of laws.act Aug. 24, 1912, ch. 387, § 1337 Stat. 516Section 86, , , related to veto power of governor.act Aug. 24, 1912, ch. 387, § 1437 Stat. 516Section 87, acts , ; , , provided for legislative expenses.Aug. 24, 1912, ch. 387, § 1537 Stat. 516Nov. 13, 1942, ch. 637, § 356 Stat. 1018Section 88, , , directed transmission of copies of law to the President and Secretary of State.act Aug. 24, 1912, ch. 387, § 1637 Stat. 517Section 89, , , required legislature to make provision for printing of laws and distribution in Territory.act Aug. 24, 1912, ch. 387, § 1637 Stat. 517Section 90, , , required all Territorial laws to be submitted to Congress.act Aug. 24, 1912, ch. 387, § 2037 Stat. 518Section 91, , , related to powers of courts and legislature.act Aug. 29, 1914, ch. 29238 Stat. 710Section 92, , , directed all appropriations by legislature to be in conformity with sections 23, 24, 67 to 73, and 74 to 90 of this title.act Feb. 18, 1929, ch. 26045 Stat. 1228
